behavior: Frontend tests, scripts, plans, harness documents, generated artifacts, dependencies, and policy projections have one current owner with obsolete or duplicate material removed.
revision_scope: Verified working tree based on the recorded revision.
changes: Consolidated repeated frontend test setup into owner-local support modules and included those modules in the maintained test scope.
Removed script clones and dead bindings, introduced shared script-test fixtures under the canonical library owner, and added script lint to the complete gate.
Archived dated harness records, completed stale active plans, deleted superseded archives, and repaired direct links and plan indexes.
Moved file-size scope ownership into the canonical repository-structure contract and deleted its duplicate contract and default projection.
Removed the unused renderer dialog package and its lockfile and rationale entries.
Consolidated the remaining Rust style, requirement-equivalence, job, template, and notification fixtures.
Lowered the duplication window from 15 to 14 significant lines with every maintained production and test scope ratcheted to zero.
Removed production, component-library, browser-test, and Rust build outputs with the bounded deep-clean command.

commands.relevant_result: The complete local gate passed with 824 script tests, 2,925 frontend tests across 246 files, production and component-library builds, 10 runtime smoke journeys within budget, SQLx metadata verification, strict linting, and the complete Rust workspace.
commands.caveat: The environment doctor reported that host Node and npm versions differ from repository-owned baselines; all checks passed.

commands.relevant_result: All six maintained production and test scopes report zero duplicated lines and zero clone regions at the enforced 14-significant-line window.
All 824 recursively discovered script contract tests passed.
Harness state, architecture, workflow policy, and file-size coverage passed before and after generated-output cleanup.
Removed production build output, component-library output, browser-test output, and the Rust target tree.
commands.caveat: These ignored directories are recreated by their respective build and test commands.

commands.relevant_result: The post-clean repository artifact and bloat audit passed.
Frontend lint passed with no errors or warnings.
Every governed maintained source and configuration file remained below the canonical hard limits.
commands.caveat: The informational modularization review list is not a hard-limit failure.

commands.relevant_result: The verified working diff contains no whitespace errors.
